meta.title: Experts in Business Law & Restructuring | Team Kraemer Law Firm
meta.description: Meet our interdisciplinary team specializing in business law, insolvency law and German-Lithuanian legal advisory in Cologne & Düsseldorf.

hero.title: Expertise That Secures Your Future
hero.subtitle: Behind every success stands a strong team. We combine legal precision with strategic business insight and intercultural expertise.

members.name: Dr. jur. Raimonda Kraemer, LL.M.
members.title: Business Lawyer & Corporate Advisor
members.bio: Since 2008 Dr. Kraemer has guided companies through complex negotiations and economic crises. With academic precision and deep understanding of business structures she develops tailored strategic solutions.

members.name: Aurelija Maumevičė, LL.M.
members.title: Attorney (Advokat, Lithuania) & Mediator
members.bio: Ms. Maumevičė acts as the legal bridge between Germany and Lithuania. Since 2014 she advises clients on cross-border legal matters and economic restructuring strategies.
members.quote: Your expert for international law and mediation.

members.name: Kristina Zindulyte-Krickl
members.title: Senior Debt Advisory Specialist
members.bio: With more than 15 years of experience in debt advisory she guides clients safely through financial restructuring and debt settlement procedures.

members.name: Aljona Hartfeld
members.title: Business Economist & Case Coordinator
members.bio: As a business economist Ms. Hartfeld ensures smooth operational workflows within the firm and supports financial analysis for client cases.

members.name: E. Schmidt
members.title: Senior Case Administrator
members.bio: Ms. Schmidt ensures that all documentation required for restructuring and advisory cases is prepared accurately and completely.

values.title: Discretion
values.description: Your trust is our highest priority.

values.title: Solution-Oriented
values.description: We focus on solutions, not problems.

cta.title: Would you like to meet our team personally?
cta.text: Use our free initial consultation to speak directly with one of our experts about your case.
